And the reason that it's important is at the moment that there are no remaining questions of fact, then either party can move for summary judgment and say, look, there's nothing left for a jury decide, we want a judge to decide this case.

And so A large part of what goes on, particularly in my arena of commercial litigation, is the jockeying to try and get a case decided on summary judgment.
